docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAGNUSON, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAGUARDIA, ROMMEL $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,802.00, PLAINTIFF TO RETURN 1988 HONDA ACCORD TO DEFENDANT BY 01/17/03.
